    • Preparation of gene sets (annoData)
    • Group-level Enrichment Analysis (brainenrich)

    • Simulation analysis (brainscore.simulate)
    • Computation on HPC with slurm

Construct an EnrichRes object

new_EnrichRes.Rd

Construct an EnrichRes object

Usage

new_EnrichRes(
  analysis_type,
  table,
  gene_sets,
  perm_scores = NULL,
  params = list(),
  diagnostics = list(),
  model_table = NULL,
  np_table = NULL,
  core_genes = NULL,
  gene_scores = NULL
)

Arguments

analysis_type

One of brainenrich or brainscore_lm_test.

table

Data frame of term-level results.

gene_sets

Named list of gene sets.

perm_scores

Matrix of null/permutation scores.

params

Named list of run parameters.

diagnostics

Named list of diagnostics.

model_table

Optional data frame for model-level results.

np_table

Optional data frame for non-parametric summaries.

core_genes

Optional data frame/list with core genes.

gene_scores

Optional matrix/vector with gene-level scores.

Value

An object of class EnrichRes.
